sections.description: Full-stack SEO management plugin for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Handles title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, og:image, llms.txt, XML sitemap, cache purge, and self-updates. RankMath not required.
sections.changelog:
2.1.2

Add og:image support: read/write rank_math_og_image via /update and /get endpoints; auto-fallback to featured image; og:image tag output in wp_head when RankMath inactive.

2.1.1

Sitemap status_header(200) fix; remove RankMath guard.
